_comment: Per-MILLION-token USD prices for Claude model tiers, used to derive session cost from real token counts (the transcript has no cost field). Values mirror BerriAI/litellm model_prices_and_context_window.json (MIT-licensed) for the Anthropic Claude tiers; cacheWrite = 1.25x input and cacheRead = 0.1x input per Anthropic prompt-caching pricing. Lathe maps a transcript's model string to a tier by substring (opus/sonnet/haiku); unknown models (e.g. 'claude-code', '<synthetic>') resolve to null so cost is shown as '—' rather than faked. Bundled (not fetched) so the package stays dependency-free and works offline. Re-pin when Anthropic pricing changes.
